{{Quote|Time to die, Wookiee!|Corrsk when confronting Lowbacca during the Battle of the Emperor's Plague Storehouse|<ref name="Young Jedi Knights: The Emperor's Plague">''[[Young Jedi Knights: The Emperor's Plague]]''</ref>}}
'''Corrsk''' was a [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] member of [[Diversity Alliance]] in [[24 ABY/Legends|24 ABY]]. He was part of [[Nolaa Tarkona]]'s inner council and a general in the Alliance military forces. Corrsk represented the Trandoshan species in the organization. He also was easily stirred and enraged.

As many others in the Diversity Alliance, Corrsk loathed the [[Human/Legends|Human]] species for the atrocities of the [[Humanocentrism|Humanocentric]] [[New Order/Legends|New Order]]. On one occasion, he was wounded by the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Lowbacca]], who had turned against the organization after having learned what had become of his four Human [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] companions. This increased Corrsk's hatred of Wookiees and Humans. Later, during the [[Battle of the Emperor's Plague Storehouse]], he was killed by Lowbacca when the Jedi launched him out of an [[Airlock/Legends|airlock]].
